command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QrZ2rXYBqwgzmZc.root --database LNiW9HuNSiWXqgLTgqgSMj --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE checkIns;
stdout:
Table	Create Table
checkIns	CREATE TABLE `checkIns` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `date` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `sleepHours` float NOT NULL,
  `sleepQuality` int NOT NULL,
  `morningEnergy` int NOT NULL,
  `caffeineToday` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `stressLevel` int NOT NULL,
  `workload` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'moderate',
  `notes` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin
